name: Brownsville Sports Park
description: Brownsville Sports Park is a place to play pickleball in Olmito, TX. There are 6 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, water, and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are not available.

name: Encore Sunshine
description: Encore Sunshine is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harlingen, TX. There are 4 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Fun-n-sun Rv Resort
description: Fun-n-sun Rv Resort is a place to play pickleball in San Benito, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Harlingen Community Center
description: Harlingen Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Harlingen, TX. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Jetstream RV Resort - Tropical Trails
description: Jetstream RV Resort - Tropical Trails is a place to play pickleball in Brownsville, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: LIV Private Community
description: LIV Private Community is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Isabel, TX. There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: Puerto Vallarta
description: Come play pickleball at Puerto Vallarta in Los Fresnos, TX! There are 4 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: RGV Pickle
description: RGV Pickle is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harlingen, TX. There are 3 indoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, and youth programming. The courts can be reserved.

name: River Ranch Resort
description: River Ranch Resort is an over 55 senior RV Campground with all the amenities & fishing you want! Located in Rio Hondo, TX, enjoy endless summer of beauty...

name: South Padre Island Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at South Padre Island Pickleball in South Padre Island, TX! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Tropic Winds RV Resort
description: Tropic Winds RV Resort is a place to play pickleball in Harlingen, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private. Reservations are not available.

name: Victor Park
description: Come play pickleball at Victor Park in Harlingen, TX! There are 2 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Whitehall Park
description: Whitehall Park is a place to play pickleball in Olmito, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
